message:
feat: add fast file transfer with io_uring, dispatch_io, and XXH3

Implement high-performance file transfer system faster than rsync:
- Binary WebSocket protocol on port 8082 for file transfers
- io_uring on Linux for async pipelined I/O
- dispatch_io on macOS for async I/O with GCD
- XXH3 SIMD-accelerated hashing (3-5x faster than xxHash64)
- Parallel file hashing and chunk compression using dispatch
- mmap for zero-copy file reads
- libdeflate compression with resume support
- Folder sync dialog with exclude patterns and dry-run preview
